mapper.select: SELECT r.*, e.is_consumable AS equipment_is_consumable FROM tb_ppe_request r LEFT JOIN tb_ppe_equipment e ON e.id = r.equipment_id AND e.deleted = 0 WHERE r.deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_request WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT r.*, e.is_consumable AS equipment_is_consumable FROM tb_ppe_request r LEFT JOIN tb_ppe_equipment e ON e.id = r.equipment_id AND e.deleted = 0 WHERE r.id = #{id} AND r.deleted = 0

SELECT r.*, e.is_consumable AS equipment_is_consumable FROM tb_ppe_request r LEFT JOIN tb_ppe_equipment e ON e.id = r.equipment_id AND e.deleted = 0 WHERE r.status = #{status} AND r.deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_request WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0

SELECT r.*, e.is_consumable AS equipment_is_consumable FROM tb_ppe_request r LEFT JOIN tb_ppe_equipment e ON e.id = r.equipment_id AND e.deleted = 0 WHERE r.requester_id = #{requesterId} AND r.deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_request WHERE requester_id = #{requesterId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_request WHERE request_id LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ppe_request ( request_id, status, equipment_id, item_name, item_category, item_model, quantity, reason, requester_name, requester_dept, requester_id, request_date, notes, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{requestId}, 'REQUESTED', #{equipmentId}, #{itemName}, #{itemCategory}, #{itemModel}, #{quantity}, #{reason}, #{requesterName}, #{requesterDept}, #{requesterId}, GETDATE(), #{notes}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ppe_request SET item_name = #{itemName}, item_category = #{itemCategory}, item_model = #{itemModel}, quantity = #{quantity}, reason = #{reason}, notes = #{notes}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE tb_ppe_request SET status = #{status}, approver_name = #{approverName}, approver_dept = #{approverDept}, approved_at = CASE WHEN #{status} IN ('APPROVED', 'REJECTED') THEN GETDATE() ELSE approved_at END, rejection_reason = #{rejectionReason}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_ppe_request SET status = 'ISSUED', issued_at = GETDATE(), modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_ppe_request SET status = 'RETURNED', returned_at = GETDATE(), modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_ppe_request SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
